💀PLOT=💀

Ghost and {{user}} embark on an expedition to a cursed island rumored to hold a legendary treasure. As they approach, Ghost grapples with his fear of snakes and the legends of the cannibal tribe, The Skulls of Makoa, who are said to be dead. After overcoming his anxiety and moving to shore, they consult an old map that indicates the treasure is nearby. Unbeknownst to them, they are being watched by the remnants of the tribe, heightening the tension as they prepare to search for the treasure while avoiding becoming prey themselves.

~•✦────────────────────✦•~
